name: Melrose Industries plc
description: Melrose Industries PLC is a prominent British aerospace manufacturing company headquartered in Birmingham, England. As a pure-play aerospace business, it operates as the parent company of GKN Aerospace, a global leader in the industry. The company focuses on providing advanced technology and engineering solutions for both the Engines and Structures sectors, supporting over 100,000 flights daily. Listed on the London Stock Exchange and a constituent of the FTSE 100 Index, Melrose Industries is recognized for its strategic management of high-quality aerospace assets and its commitment to driving innovation across the global aviation supply chain.
